title: [Upper Trollfang, Winding Trees]
description: A dense wall of thick fog covers the path to the southeast making it impossible to venture further in that direction.  You feel an odd stirring of mana within it that makes you uneasy, as if it were somehow alive and aware of your presence.

wayto.24675: ;e UserVars.mapdb_redforest_location = 'WL';result = nil;until result =~ /Obvious paths: northeast, southeast/;fput "stand" until standing?;result = dothistimeout "go fog", 5, /You attempt to navigate your way through the fog, but get turned around and come right back out where you started!|Obvious paths: northeast, southeast/;if result =~ /You attempt to navigate your way through the fog, but get turned around and come right back out where you started!/;sleep 0.5;waitrt?;end;end
